textByHash.eeba47ec917cdc1df9cf82cb002a352d6d4e2b42: Boss wants to talk to you. She's downstairs in the pits.
textByHash.9c0a0d92b686682e0a137f42d11b727f84d52e7c: Have you spoken with the boss yet?
textByHash.b949c608510a143d0bad1227b52011a91213ba5a: Stop right there. You'll get not hints out of me.
textByHash.a62df4363ccf78908a3745451f29600390e36e75: I hope you're better at ratcatching than lying.
textByHash.1f5a43005e8ff4c83ff55f10e57fee7c5e8ff1ad: I've had her since she was a kitten. Felkrash trained her for me.
textByHash.841d425cea89f664797f679d1d0266a01b531746: Oh yes! There was this one time she helped Felkrash wipe out all the rats in town by -
textByHash.2ebeeb84c08a21f57aa6c1e90d4b7d1cd4cae5af: Oh, I see. Nice try, , but you'll have to be cleverer than that.
textByHash.70b5dcf6101c4a0a36670b8a5a0e41b5eeeb9d50: How dare you! Felkrash is the greatest ratcatcher Gielinor's ever seen!
textByHash.402a4e55481b4259ad2d9f8eaf1168f64ef80ee4: I'll have you know she once killed all the rats in Port Sarim with just one attack!
textByHash.92dd5079650206ea2a09a1917063ea06b2d19d29: It's true! I saw it happen. She used a magic flute to charm the rats into the sea!
textByHash.06a1addb2227f12d3cd2780dc320462c5211e175: Wait... I uh, I shouldn't have said that.
textByHash.beaca0a49d7bb8941f3c5ca18d473d12c432fc83: Felkrash told me of the task she set you.
textByHash.b323d9ffe5cfb74b4e48acdc6061bb4145e9cc27: I shouldn't have told you that story. Shame on you for coaxing it out of me.
textByHash.5a268bbb215b726ac51808ab5f5e6d8c8c76798e: That was an amazing performance! I've only seen one like it... as you know.
textByHash.ab1ad00133dd139a326859536f56b13041951c3c: And it had better stay that way!
textByHash.34a376af6b435b6c930447155193033922f81d04: Step away from that manhole, you've no business down there.
textByHash.05b8619b652a8fde5d0677c07a6ab8fdb833dee2: Ah you, peasant. Felkrash wishes to speak with you.
textByHash.194726efb4d2eacc36f8e5a627757b8350aa075d: You should find her below in the pits.
textByHash.0fe178c09fd3aa8af53d6071c35c5a7307f80f95: Oh it's you again. *She glances at you with barely disguised disdain.*
textByHash.6b4cc047fa9c7a7f8e146df6093e8f5bf826b0fa: Have you spoken with Felkrash yet?
textByHash.a0c0f23da6d89422c933c2ca91422ecc11809397: Ah yes Belle. What a cat. Felkrash trained her for me shortly after she single handedly charmed all the rats of the Port and drowned them.
textByHash.d90fe775d6874087c7ae0ae711cf937829eea236: I don't know, I really shouldn't.
textByHash.7d9e4a8c1f75185e377a6ab61aa2a49f073cdf16: *The face's face perks up at the mention of the word pretty.*
textByHash.aae45138025b5576e497c27313e8acf1748fa997: Oh. *And just as quickly turns sour again.*
textByHash.24e10c3c1caa5a674d0be875970345cb53a154bc: Do you know something, I think I'll tell you, mind you, don't tell Felkrash about this, she'd only get sore with me.
textByHash.7a0db73d3b3ec0652a0c36a7526892587e739f59: She's the story teller not me.
textByHash.4e1b80f3849d2eece69a5a99ea74640aebdb40b7: And that is how she drowned the rats.
textByHash.c89ca83d65d21b34edd8551b251b95c872fffe9b: ..and that is how she drowned the rats.
textByHash.47d8b310d7c4e253892d97d3aa8d61cd8e60e382: I shouldn't have told that story. Shame on you for coaxing it out of me.
textByHash.e2a56cfe42f54f1caa7072dd2603a96af317358f: I must congratulate you on your performance, I have only ever seen one other display of musicality to match, as you should know.
